_comment: Synthetic governance files (metadata + short content excerpt). FILE-002 (B.B.A. self-study draft) carries an Internal sensitivity label and is restricted to leadership + committee members; FILE-003 (faculty personnel review) is restricted to leadership only — both demonstrate sensitivity-label / file-level permission trimming.

files.name: B.B.A. Program Review Template.docx
files.summary: The B.B.A. program-review working template. Tracks the assessment plan, the course-sequence change, and the assurance-of-learning actions feeding the AACSB self-study.
files.content_excerpt: Sections: 1 Assessment plan (revised, approved); 2 Course-sequence change (conditionally approved); 3 Assurance-of-learning closed-loop evidence (in progress).

files.name: B.B.A. AACSB Self-Study Draft.docx
files.label: Internal — Accreditation
files.summary: Sensitivity-labelled draft AACSB self-study for the B.B.A. program. Documents the closed-loop assurance-of-learning evidence and the program-review sign-off status; pre-decisional and not for wide distribution.
files.content_excerpt: Standard 5 (Assurance of Learning): written-communication loop closure in progress. Standard 4 (Curriculum): course-sequence change conditionally approved, sign-off pending.

files.name: Faculty Personnel Review (confidential).pdf
files.label: Confidential — Personnel
files.summary: Confidential faculty personnel review related to B.B.A. program staffing. Restricted to college and provost leadership.
files.content_excerpt: [RESTRICTED — personnel] Reappointment recommendation and evaluation notes.
